name: accounting-ai
description: Accounting Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_invoice
tools.description: Generate a professional invoice with line items, VAT, and totals.

tools.name: categorize_expenses
tools.description: Automatically categorize business expenses by type.

tools.name: calculate_vat
tools.description: Calculate VAT/tax for any country with support for inclusive/exclusive amounts.

tools.name: profit_and_loss
tools.description: Generate a profit and loss statement from income and expense records.

tools.name: bank_reconciliation
tools.description: Reconcile bank statement transactions against book records.
